description.ko: 남색 초고층 빌딩과 홀로그램 비가 미래의 우울한 심장을 정의하는 로맨틱한 테크 누아르 도시 풍경.
description.en: A romanticized tech-noir cityscape where indigo skyscrapers and holographic rain define the future's melancholic heart.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Silicon Pulse.' #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are linked by sky-bridges pulsing with #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan holographic data streams. A heavy downpour creates ray-traced reflections on wet metallic asphalt. High-speed maglev vehicles leave #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through dense, smoky volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, flickering lens flares, 8k resolution.
